channel.title: eu-tech-jobs — new EU AI/tech jobs (daily)
channel.description: New jobs added to the eu-tech-jobs daily snapshot. Open-data; CC BY 4.0.

item.title: Begeleider LVB — prisma
item.description: prisma · Made, Nederland Wil jij écht het verschil maken? Bij Prisma draait zorg om persoonlijke aandacht en verbinding. Als begeleider op het Sint Jozefhof in Made ondersteun je cliënten met een lichte verstandelijke beperking (LVB/LVB+) bij hun dagelijks leven en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Elke dag is anders: jij ziet wat een bewoner nodig heeft, ook als dit niet met woorden wordt gezegd, en zorgt dat zij zich veilig en begrepen voelen. De beloning? Een glimlach aan het einde van de dag. **Een dag uit het leven van e

item.title: Begeleider LVB — prisma
item.description: prisma · Hooge Zwaluwe, Nederland Bij Prisma draait zorg om persoonlijke aandacht. We kijken naar de wensen en dromen van de mensen die we ondersteunen en leren hen echt kennen. Zo begrijpen we wat iemand nodig heeft, ook als dat niet altijd in woorden wordt uitgedrukt. Als begeleider op onze locatie aan de Godwaldtstraat in Hooge Zwaluwe ondersteun je 14 bewoners met een lichte verstandelijke beperking. Zij wonen zelfstandig in hun eigen appartement, met begeleiding die aansluit bij hun mogelijkheden en behoeften. Jouw inzet

item.title: Junior Quantum Success Engineer — qblox
item.description: qblox · Delft, Netherlands Qblox is looking for a Junior Quantum Success Engineer to join our Quantum Success Engineering (QSE) team. We specialise in quantum control stacks that generate the analogue signals required for the control and readout of quantum bits. The QSE team ensures customer success through technical support, onboarding, and acting as the voice of the customer back into Qblox's product development. **This is an entry-level role** designed for someone eager to grow their technical and customer-facing skil

item.title: Mobile Team Lead — mayflower
item.description: mayflower · Limassol, Cyprus The Team Lead is responsible for leading a cross-functional engineering team with a focus on delivering operational excellence, fostering team growth, and aligning delivery efforts with business objectives. This is a foundational leadership role that ensures team effectiveness through strategic planning, performance management, and strong collaboration with technical and business stakeholders. The Team Lead acts as a force multiplier, enabling individuals and the team to succeed. #### Job Respo

item.title: Junior Procure to Pay Accountant — sumup
item.description:
sumup · Sofia, Bulgaria

Junior Procure to Pay Accountant

Sofia - office-first | Full-time

 

About the team

Our Procure to Pay (P2P) team sits at the core of SumUp's finance operations, making sure vendor invoices move smoothly from receipt all the way through to payment across multiple legal entities and markets. The team works closely with business functions across 15 offices in Europe, handling everything from invoice processin

item.title: Game Developer/Game Mods Developer (Gaming) — fulcrum
item.description: fulcrum · All Locations, Ukraine About **Fulcrum**: We’re a team of tech-savvy, creative & passionate IT professionals. We’ve created a vibrant and performance-driven culture for ourselves where everyone is free to think & act outside the box. There are literally no limits to what you can do here, as long as we WOW our clients and OVER deliver what we promise. We are now looking for a Game Developer/ Game Mods Developer (Gaming) to join our team ( full-time, remote). **Project Overview** We are building an AI Gaming

item.title: Senior Named Account Executive, Digital Natives — cloudflare
item.description:
cloudflare · Hybrid
About Us

At Cloudflare, we are on a mission to help build a better Internet. Today the company runs one of the world’s largest networks that powers millions of websites and other Internet properties for customers ranging from individual bloggers to SMBs to Fortune 500 companies. Cloudflare protects and accelerates any Internet application online without adding hardware, installing software, or changing a line of code. Internet prope

item.title: Inbound Operations Specialist - Temporary Contract — sonarsource
item.description: sonarsource · Geneva ### **Who is Sonar?** Sonar is driving the future of agent-centric software development. As the leader in AI code review and verification, we solve a critical problem: ensuring that software generated by AI-assisted developers or autonomous agents is reliable, secure, and maintainable. Integrating seamlessly with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and Devin, we help over 75% of the Fortune 100 build trusted, reliable, compliant software. Customers who use Sonar are 44% less li

item.title: Product Growth Manager, AI Agent Platform — patsnap
item.description: patsnap · Suzhou **About the Role** We are looking for a Product Growth Manager to drive growth and operations for our AI Agent Platform, serving users and customers in North America and Europe. This role sits at the intersection of product, growth, GTM, content, and AI-enabled operations. You will be responsible for acquiring users, improving activation and conversion, building scalable growth programs, and turning user insights into actionable product and business outcomes. This is a hands-on role for some

item.title: Product Marketing Manager, GTM – AI Agent Platform — patsnap
item.description: patsnap · Suzhou **About the Role** We are looking for a Product Marketing Manager, GTM to help bring our AI Agent Platform to global  markets, with a primary focus on North America and Europe. This role sits at the intersection of product, market, customer insight, and go-to-market execution. You will translate product capabilities into clear value propositions, build messaging and positioning for global audiences, and support launch and adoption across different market segments. The ideal candidate is AI-f

item.title: Account Manager (Territory Engagement and Operations Manager) — axiom
item.description:
axiom · Belfast, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom

 

Account Manager (Territory Engagement and Operations Manager) 

Location: Belfast

\*Closing date 15th May\*

 

About Axiom:

Axiom is where legal teams go to find the right talent for everything from routine in-house tasks to complex outside counsel work. Too many legal departments are stuck having to choose between paying the high fees of their law firm, hiring ful

item.title: Talent Sourcer — postman
item.description:
postman · London, UK

Who Are We?

Postman is the world’s leading API platform, used by more than 45 million+ developers and 500,000 organizations, including 98% of the Fortune 500. Postman is helping developers and professionals across the globe build the API-first world by simplifying each step of the API lifecycle and streamlining collaboration—enabling users to create better APIs, faster.

The company is headquartered in San Francisco and has offices in

item.title: Senior Underwriter — attune
item.description:
attune · Remote

At Attune, we're changing small business insurance in a big way. Small business owners need insurance to protect their businesses, but when it comes time to get a policy, they’re bogged down by hundreds of questions, lots of paperwork, and a seemingly never-ending timeline stretching for weeks or months. 

We are changing all that. By using data and technology expertise to understand risk, automating legacy processes, and creating a better user experience for brokers, we’re able to

item.title: Operations Relationship Manager — stage
item.description:
stage · Wayne, Pennsylvania or Des Moines, Iowa

COMPANY OVERVIEW

KKR is a leading global investment firm that offers alternative asset management as well as capital markets and insurance solutions. KKR aims to generate attractive investment returns by following a patient and disciplined investment approach, employing world-class people, and supporting growth in its portfolio companies and communities. KKR sponsors investment funds that invest in private equity, credit and real assets and h

item.title: Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management — stripe
item.description:
stripe · Remote

Who we are

About Stripe

Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies - from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups - use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented op

About Petra Brands: 

Petra Brands is a dynamic and innovative company that encompasses a diverse range of brands, including House of Party, Fomin, EveryMood and Roofus Pet. We specialize in creating unique and compelling consumer packaged goods (CPG) in the beauty, personal care, and lifestyle

item.title: Product Manager — via-wwr-userwise-services
item.description:
via-wwr-userwise-services · Anywhere in the World

Headquarters: Hungary

Job Description

We’re looking for a sharp, data-driven Product Manager to take ownership of one of our exciting casual titles! This is a full-time, remote position for a product champion ready to manage the daily heartbeat of a game featuring a massive global IP. You will be the "CEO of your product," ensuring that fans of this beloved universe enjoy a fresh, engaging, and balanced experience every time they log in.

Unqork empowers enterprises to accelerate growth by rapidly building, testing, and running applications that are designed to be AI-native. Trusted by the world’s largest organizations in highly regulated industries, these applications become more secure over time while significantly reducing technical debt—allowing businesses to focus on innovation rather than maintenance. OpenSea is the gateway to web3’s next chapter—where NFTs, fungible tokens, and emerging digital assets converge to create open, user-owned economies. As a foundational player in the crypto space, we’re building infrastructure that supports millions of users and sets new standards for how people discover and exchange digital value.
